speaker: speaker1
text: Honey , I have something important to say .

speaker: speaker2
text: Something important ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . I have just booked two tickets .

speaker: speaker2
text: Tickets ? What tickets ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Two air tickets .

speaker: speaker2
text: Air tickets ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . We will fly to Paris the day after tomorrow .

speaker: speaker2
text: We ? The day after tomorrow ? What are you talking about ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Today is June 18 , isn ’ t it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . So ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Think about it !

speaker: speaker2
text: Then it is June 20 the day after tomorrow .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . Think about it carefully .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , come on . Tell me please . Why did you book tickets to Paris ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , honey ! Don ’ t you remember this important day to us ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sorry .

speaker: speaker1
text: It is our 10th wedding anniversary this June 20 .

speaker: speaker2
text: Our 10th wedding anniversary ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course . You completely forgot it .

speaker: speaker2
text: Darling . I think you have made a mistake .

speaker: speaker1
text: I have made a mistake ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . We married on July 20 ten years ago .

speaker: speaker1
text: July 20 ? But I think it should be June 20 .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . We had planned to marry on June 20 , but something happened , so we had to put off our wedding day .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . I remember now . We put it off . I did make a mistake . But how shall we deal with the tickets ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Since you have booked . Then let ’ s celebrate our wedding anniversary before hand .
